name: sivel-poker-online
description: Sivel Poker with server-authoritative multiplayer, stable public-table connections, and automated gameplay tests.

scripts.start: node apply-server-authority-v55.js && node apply-gameplay-stability-v57.js && node server.js
scripts.test: node --check apply-server-authority-v55.js && node --check apply-gameplay-stability-v57.js && node apply-server-authority-v55.js && node apply-gameplay-stability-v57.js && node --check server.js && node --check account-store.js
